title: More Block Variations (Vertical Slabs)
description: Need a vertical slab? A vertical stair? A corner? We got you covered!
body:
Ever needed a vertical slab, vertical stair or corner? Well that is exactly what this mod contains!

Most blocks in Minecraft have been converted to vertical slabs, stairs and corners!

![A couple types of block variants, dirt, oak log and bookshelf.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dade0766cb103be1983d379b8c74e9801b908926.png)
